check_content_excerpt:
Verify the "systemd-timesyncd" package is not installed with the following command:

$ dpkg -l | grep systemd-timesyncd

If the "systemd-timesyncd" package is installed, this is a finding.
fix_text_excerpt:
The "systemd-timesyncd" package will be uninstalled as part of the "chrony" package install. Purge the remaining configuration files for "systemd-timesyncd" from Ubuntu 24.04 LTS:

$ sudo apt-get purge systemd-timesyncd
title: Ubuntu 24.04 LTS must not have the "systemd-timesyncd" package installed.
